title: Trump Misstates Facts in State of the Union Regarding Charlotte Murder
summary: Trump incorrectly claimed the suspect in a Charlotte murder case came through open borders; the suspect was a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the spread of misinformation and its potential impact on immigration debates and local community perceptions.
